rationale: Educ. Code §25.039 governs inter-district tuition contracts and is unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions or appraised value amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: A school district that does not offer each grade level from kindergarten through grade 12 may provide by contract for students residing in the district who are at grade levels not offered by the district to be educated at those grade levels in one or more other districts.
_note: No relationship between this statute and the proposed homestead exemption increase.
